LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. TRIMARK ERF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM. THE PURPORTED EVIDENCE ATTACHED TO MR. KAY'S DECLARATION AS EXHIBIT A IS NOT A STATEMENT "CONTAINING A RUNNING AND CURRENT LIST OF ALL OF THE INVOICES AND OR CHARGES, AND EACH OF THE SAME, WHICH ARE PRESENTLY DUE, SETTING FORTH THE DATE OF THE INVOICE AND/OR CHARGE, THE DUE DATE THEREOF, THE INVOICE AND/OR CHARGE NUMBER AND THE AMOUNT THEREOF, INDICATING A PRESENT UNPAID BALANCE IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 12,369.20 AS OF MARCH 8, 2013" OR A COPY OF "PLAINTIFF'S JOURNAL PAGE, LEDGER CARD AND COMPUTER PRINTOUT OR OTHERWISE ITEMIZED STATEMENT INDICATING ALL CHARGES AND PAYMENTS APPLIED TO THOSE INVOICE AND/OR CHARGES." (KAY DECL., P. 2:15-19, 2:21-23.) INSTEAD OF ATTACHING THE DESCRIBED STATEMENT, MR. KAY ATTACHES COPIES OF 3 INVOICES. (KAY DECL., EXHIBIT A.) FURTHER, THE 3 INVOICES ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT A DO NOT CONTAIN ANY PROVISIONS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT 2000 PLUS "AGREED TO SUCH INTEREST, SERVICE AND FINANCE CHARGES, AND EACH OF THEM." (ID. AT P. 4:6-8.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-02-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Trimark Erf, Inc.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff TRIMARK ERF, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order IS
Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is to be heard at 9:30 am on the Law and Motion calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'s Application For Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Denied without prejudice. Trimark ERF has not demonstrated the probable validity of its claim. The purported evidence attached to Mr. Kay's declaration as Exhibit A is not a statement "containing a running and current list of all of the invoices and or charges, and each of the same, which are presently due, setting forth the date of the invoice and/or charge, the due date thereof, the invoice and/or charge number and the amount thereof, indicating a present unpaid balance in the amount of $ 12,369.20 as of March 8, 2013" or a copy of "Plaintiff's journal page, ledger card and computer printout or otherwise itemized statement indicating all charges and payments applied to those invoice and/or charges." (Kay Decl., p. 2:15-19, 2:21-23.) Instead of attaching the described statement, Mr. Kay attaches copies of 3 invoices. (Kay Decl., Exhibit A.) Further, the 3 invoices attached as Exhibit A do not contain any provisions to demonstrate that 2000 Plus "agreed to such interest, service and finance charges, and each of them." (Id. at p. 4:6-8.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
